steps.title: Calculate water lost
steps.content:
The bowl started with 20 ounces and now contains 9 ounces.
$$\text{Water lost} = 20 - 9 = 11 \text{ ounces}$$

steps.title: Convert water loss to days using the rate
steps.content:
The water decreases by 1 ounce every 4 days. For 11 ounces of loss:
$$\text{Days uncovered} = 11 \text{ ounces} \times \frac{4 \text{ days}}{1 \text{ ounce}} = 44 \text{ days}$$
That matches Choice D — $44$.
